pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh scripts confirm this path is used to restore and launch the database
Task setup scripts reference this path; Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite is the official Chinook database file from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database
Task description specifies this exact query name in requirements and verifier.py confirms it

Executed the reference SQL query against the actual Chinook database: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate), strftime('%m', InvoiceDate), COUNT(*), SUM(Total), AVG(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate), strftime('%m', InvoiceDate) HAVING SUM(Total) > 40. Result: 10 rows (months with invoice totals exceeding 40 in the invoice-year data from 2021-01-01 to 2025-12-22)
Same query execution as min_expected_rows above. The maximum expected rows is also 10, not 45, since the result set contains exactly 10 rows matching the HAVING SUM(Total) > 40 condition
create_chinook_odb.py script creates HSQLDB 1.8 embedded database; official Chinook repository provides SQLite version

pi_items.verified_value: Public Chinook database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database - contains real iTunes media data combined with fictional customer/employee data and auto-generated sales transactions
pi_items.source: GitHub repository documentation and WebFetch of lerocha/chinook-database README; media data is real from iTunes Library, customer/employee data is fictional, sales data is auto-generated
Executed COUNT(*) FROM Invoice on Chinook database; also confirmed in SchemaSpy documentation (https://schemaspy.org/samples/chinook/tables/Invoice.html) which states 412 rows
Executed SELECT MIN(InvoiceDate), MAX(InvoiceDate) FROM Invoice on Chinook database
Executed: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate), strftime('%m', InvoiceDate) FROM Invoice GROUP BY strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate), strftime('%m', InvoiceDate))

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the public Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) which contains real iTunes media data combined with fictional customer/employee data and auto-generated sales transactions. The Invoice table contains 412 rows spanning 2021-01-01 to 2025-12-22. When executing the required monthly revenue analysis query (GROUP BY year/month with HAVING SUM(Total) > 40 on the Invoice table), the actual result is 10 rows, not the claimed min_expected_rows=25 and max_expected_rows=45. The metadata row count claims are contradicted by direct query execution against the authoritative Chinook database.
